ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation scenario */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in days */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population involved in the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the simulation covers */,
  "initial_infection_count" INTEGER /* Initial number of infected individuals */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Rate of vaccination in the population */,
  "public_health_interventions" TEXT /* JSON string describing public health interventions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation it belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time point in the simulation */,
  "infectious" REAL /* Number of infectious individuals at this time */,
  "recovered" REAL /* Number of recovered individuals */,
  "susceptible" REAL /* Number of susceptible individuals */,
  "recovering" REAL /* Number of individuals recovering */,
  "succumbing" REAL /* Number of individuals succumbing */,
  "contact_infectivity" REAL /* Contact infectivity rate */,
  "hospitalized" REAL /* Number of individuals hospitalized */,
  "icu" REAL /* Number of individuals in ICU */,
  "deceased" REAL /* Number of deceased individuals */,
  "vaccinated" REAL /* Number of vaccinated individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation it is associated with */,
  "infectivity" REAL /* Infectivity rate for the disease */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate for the disease */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the infectious period */,
  "contact_rate" REAL /* Rate of contact between individuals */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate at which infected individuals require hospitalization */,
  "icu_rate" REAL /* Rate at which hospitalized individuals require ICU care */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Fatality rate of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, public health official) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the simulation was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
